name: Shrimp Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Large shrimp, shelled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together broth, sesame seeds, ginger, soy sauce, hot pepper sauce, and cornstarch until well blended. Set aside.
2. In a large skillet or wok, heat 2 tablespoons oil. Stir-fry jicama and carrots for 3 minutes. Remove from pan and set aside.
3. Add oil if needed and stir-fry bell pepper with shrimp and garlic for 3 minutes, or until shrimp turn pink and opaque.
4. Stir the sauce again; pour into the center of the wok. Cook until the mixture bubbles.
5. Return jicama and carrots to the pan. Cover and cook 2 minutes longer, until heated through.
6. Serve over hot cooked rice.
